# jupiterone_control_framework_requirement (Resource)

A requirement belonging to a control framework.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `framework_id` (String) The ID of the control framework this requirement belongs to
- `title` (String) The title of the requirement

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the requirement
- `identifier` (String) A unique identifier for the requirement
- `priority` (String) Priority of the requirement
- `section` (String) The section this requirement belongs to

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
